title: MiroFish Crypto Sentiment Report
summary:
Revenue: $299/report, sold via Fiverr; paper-trade sample for free.
- **Time to first $**: 1 day (generate sample + list on Fiverr).
- **First action**: Run MiroFish simulation for SOL/ETH, generate sample report, upload to Fiverr.
- **Risk**: Crypto volatility reducing perceived value (mitigated by focusing on short-term trends).
